Catalog/Joint Replacement
📦

OPULENT Gold ST

OPULENT Gold ST Total Knee Replacement System

Complete surgical instrument set for tibial and femoral preparation with extra-medullary alignment

Joint ReplacementREF: MRL-OPL-001

Complete total knee replacement system with comprehensive surgical instrumentation for tibial and femoral preparation, including extra-medullary alignment guides and cutting jigs

Technical Specifications

tibial slope options0°, 3°, 5°
tibial resection range0-13mm adjustable
femoral valgus angle±10° range
distal femur cut9mm standard
spacer block sizes9mm, 11mm, 14mm, 17mm
saw blade thickness1.24mm
saw blade width25mm
drill size8mm step drill
im rod lengths30cm, 40cm
pin adjustment±2mm guide holes
ManufacturerMeril Life Sciences
MaterialMedical grade stainless steel and titanium alloy
